endpoints.name: List changes
endpoints.description: Whenever Orthanc receives a new DICOM instance, this event is recorded in the so-called _Changes Log_. This enables remote scripts to react to the arrival of new DICOM resources. A typical application is auto-routing, where an external script waits for a new DICOM instance to arrive into Orthanc, then forward this instance to another modality.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: Clear changes
endpoints.description: Clear the full history stored in the changes log
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: List exports
endpoints.description: For medical traceability, Orthanc can be configured to store a log of all the resources that have been exported to remote modalities. In auto-routing scenarios, it is important to prevent this log to grow indefinitely as incoming instances are routed. You can either disable this logging by setting the option `LogExportedResources` to `false` in the configuration file, or periodically clear this log by `DELETE`-ing this URI. This route might be removed in future versions of Orthanc.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: Clear exports
endpoints.description: Clear the full history stored in the exports log
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: List the available instances
endpoints.description: List the Orthanc identifiers of all the available DICOM instances
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: Get information about some instance
endpoints.description: Get detailed information about the DICOM instance whose Orthanc identifier is provided in the URL
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Delete some instance
endpoints.description: Delete the DICOM instance whose Orthanc identifier is provided in the URL
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Anonymize instance
endpoints.description: Download an anonymized version of the DICOM instance whose Orthanc identifier is provided in the URL: https://book.orthanc-server.com/users/anonymization.html#anonymization-of-a-single-instance
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: List attachments
endpoints.description: Get the list of attachments that are associated with the given instance
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: List operations on attachments
endpoints.description: Get the list of the operations that are available for attachments associated with the given instance
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: Delete attachment
endpoints.description: Delete an attachment associated with the given DICOM instance. This call will fail if trying to delete a system attachment (i.e. whose index is < 1024).
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: Compress attachment
endpoints.description: Change the compression scheme that is used to store an attachment.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: Get attachment (no decompression)
endpoints.description: Get the (binary) content of one attachment associated with the given instance. The attachment will not be decompressed if `StorageCompression` is `true`.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: Get MD5 of attachment on disk
endpoints.description: Get the MD5 hash of one attachment associated with the given instance, as stored on the disk. This is different from `.../md5` iff `EnableStorage` is `true`.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: Get size of attachment on disk
endpoints.description: Get the size of one attachment associated with the given instance, as stored on the disk. This is different from `.../size` iff `EnableStorage` is `true`.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: Get attachment
endpoints.description: Get the (binary) content of one attachment associated with the given instance
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: Get info about the attachment
endpoints.description: Get all the information about the attachment associated with the given instance
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: Is attachment compressed?
endpoints.description: Test whether the attachment has been stored as a compressed file on the disk.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: Get MD5 of attachment
endpoints.description: Get the MD5 hash of one attachment associated with the given instance
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: Get size of attachment
endpoints.description: Get the size of one attachment associated with the given instance
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: Uncompress attachment
endpoints.description: Change the compression scheme that is used to store an attachment.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: Verify attachment
endpoints.description: Verify that the attachment is not corrupted, by validating its MD5 hash
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: Get raw tag
endpoints.description: Get the raw content of one DICOM tag in the hierarchy of DICOM dataset
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Download DICOM
endpoints.description: Download one DICOM instance
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: List available frames
endpoints.description: List the frames that are available in the DICOM instance of interest
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: List operations
endpoints.description: List the available operations under URI `/instances/{id}/frames/{frame}/`
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{FRAME}} with a real frame.

endpoints.name: Decode a frame (int16)
endpoints.description: Decode one frame of interest from the given DICOM instance. Pixels of grayscale images are truncated to the [-32768,32767] range. Negative values must be interpreted according to two's complement.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{FRAME}} with a real frame.

endpoints.name: Decode a frame (uint16)
endpoints.description: Decode one frame of interest from the given DICOM instance. Pixels of grayscale images are truncated to the [0,65535] range.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{FRAME}} with a real frame.

endpoints.name: Decode a frame (uint8)
endpoints.description: Decode one frame of interest from the given DICOM instance. Pixels of grayscale images are truncated to the [0,255] range.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{FRAME}} with a real frame.

endpoints.name: Decode frame for Matlab
endpoints.description: Decode one frame of interest from the given DICOM instance, and export this frame as a Octave/Matlab matrix to be imported with `eval()`: https://book.orthanc-server.com/faq/matlab.html
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{FRAME}} with a real frame.

endpoints.name: Decode frame for numpy
endpoints.description: Decode one frame of interest from the given DICOM instance, for use with numpy in Python. The numpy array has 3 dimensions: (height, width, color channel).
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{FRAME}} with a real frame.

endpoints.name: Decode a frame (preview)
endpoints.description: Decode one frame of interest from the given DICOM instance. The full dynamic range of grayscale images is rescaled to the [0,255] range.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{FRAME}} with a real frame.

endpoints.name: Access raw frame
endpoints.description: Access the raw content of one individual frame of the DICOM instance of interest, bypassing image decoding. This is notably useful to access the source files in compressed transfer syntaxes.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{FRAME}} with a real frame.

endpoints.name: Access raw frame (compressed)
endpoints.description: Access the raw content of one individual frame of the DICOM instance of interest, bypassing image decoding. This is notably useful to access the source files in compressed transfer syntaxes. The image is compressed using gzip
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{FRAME}} with a real frame.

endpoints.name: Render a frame
endpoints.description: Render one frame of interest from the given DICOM instance. This function takes scaling into account (`RescaleSlope` and `RescaleIntercept` tags), as well as the default windowing stored in the DICOM file (`WindowCenter` and `WindowWidth`tags), and can be used to resize the resulting image. Color images are not affected by windowing.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{FRAME}} with a real frame.

endpoints.name: Get DICOM meta-header
endpoints.description: Get the DICOM tags in the meta-header of the DICOM instance. By default, the `full` format is used, which combines hexadecimal tags with human-readable description.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Decode an image (int16)
endpoints.description: Decode the first frame of the given DICOM instance. Pixels of grayscale images are truncated to the [-32768,32767] range. Negative values must be interpreted according to two's complement.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Decode an image (uint16)
endpoints.description: Decode the first frame of the given DICOM instance. Pixels of grayscale images are truncated to the [0,65535] range.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Decode an image (uint8)
endpoints.description: Decode the first frame of the given DICOM instance. Pixels of grayscale images are truncated to the [0,255] range.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Decode frame for Matlab
endpoints.description: Decode the first frame of the given DICOM instance., and export this frame as a Octave/Matlab matrix to be imported with `eval()`: https://book.orthanc-server.com/faq/matlab.html
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: List metadata
endpoints.description: Get the list of metadata that are associated with the given instance
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get metadata
endpoints.description: Get the value of a metadata that is associated with the given instance
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: Delete metadata
endpoints.description: Delete some metadata associated with the given DICOM instance. This call will fail if trying to delete a system metadata (i.e. whose index is < 1024).
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: Modify instance
endpoints.description: Download a modified version of the DICOM instance whose Orthanc identifier is provided in the URL: https://book.orthanc-server.com/users/anonymization.html#modification-of-a-single-instance
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get instance module
endpoints.description: Get the instance module of the DICOM instance whose Orthanc identifier is provided in the URL
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Decode instance for numpy
endpoints.description: Decode the given DICOM instance, for use with numpy in Python. The numpy array has 4 dimensions: (frame, height, width, color channel).
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get parent patient
endpoints.description: Get detailed information about the parent patient of the DICOM instance whose Orthanc identifier is provided in the URL
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get embedded PDF
endpoints.description: Get the PDF file that is embedded in one DICOM instance. If the DICOM instance doesn't contain the `EncapsulatedDocument` tag or if the `MIMETypeOfEncapsulatedDocument` tag doesn't correspond to the PDF type, a `404` HTTP error is raised.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Decode an image (preview)
endpoints.description: Decode the first frame of the given DICOM instance. The full dynamic range of grayscale images is rescaled to the [0,255] range.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Reconstruct tags & optionally files of instance
endpoints.description: Reconstruct the main DICOM tags in DB of the instance whose Orthanc identifier is provided in the URL. This is useful if child studies/series/instances have inconsistent values for higher-level tags, in order to force Orthanc to use the value from the resource of interest. Beware that this is a time-consuming operation, as all the children DICOM instances will be parsed again, and the Orthanc index will be updated accordingly.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Render an image
endpoints.description: Render the first frame of the given DICOM instance. This function takes scaling into account (`RescaleSlope` and `RescaleIntercept` tags), as well as the default windowing stored in the DICOM file (`WindowCenter` and `WindowWidth`tags), and can be used to resize the resulting image. Color images are not affected by windowing.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get parent series
endpoints.description: Get detailed information about the parent series of the DICOM instance whose Orthanc identifier is provided in the URL
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get human-readable tags
endpoints.description: Get the DICOM tags in human-readable format (same as the `/instances/{id}/tags?simplify` route)
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get instance statistics
endpoints.description: Get statistics about the given instance
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get parent study
endpoints.description: Get detailed information about the parent study of the DICOM instance whose Orthanc identifier is provided in the URL
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get DICOM tags
endpoints.description: Get the DICOM tags in the specified format. By default, the `full` format is used, which combines hexadecimal tags with human-readable description.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: List jobs
endpoints.description: List all the available jobs
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: Get job
endpoints.description: Retrieve detailed information about the job whose identifier is provided in the URL: https://book.orthanc-server.com/users/advanced-rest.html#jobs
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Cancel job
endpoints.description: Cancel the job whose identifier is provided in the URL. Check out the Orthanc Book for more information about the state machine applicable to jobs: https://book.orthanc-server.com/users/advanced-rest.html#jobs
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Pause job
endpoints.description: Pause the job whose identifier is provided in the URL. Check out the Orthanc Book for more information about the state machine applicable to jobs: https://book.orthanc-server.com/users/advanced-rest.html#jobs
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Resubmit job
endpoints.description: Resubmit the job whose identifier is provided in the URL. Check out the Orthanc Book for more information about the state machine applicable to jobs: https://book.orthanc-server.com/users/advanced-rest.html#jobs
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Resume job
endpoints.description: Resume the job whose identifier is provided in the URL. Check out the Orthanc Book for more information about the state machine applicable to jobs: https://book.orthanc-server.com/users/advanced-rest.html#jobs
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get job output
endpoints.description: Retrieve some output produced by a job. As of Orthanc 1.8.2, only the jobs that generate a DICOMDIR media or a ZIP archive provide such an output (with `key` equals to `archive`).
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{KEY}} with a real key.

endpoints.name: List DICOM modalities
endpoints.description: List all the DICOM modalities that are known to Orthanc. This corresponds either to the content of the `DicomModalities` configuration option, or to the information stored in the database if `DicomModalitiesInDatabase` is `true`.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: List operations on modality
endpoints.description: List the operations that are available for a DICOM modality.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Update DICOM modality
endpoints.description: Define a new DICOM modality, or update an existing one. This change is permanent iff. `DicomModalitiesInDatabase` is `true`, otherwise it is lost at the next restart of Orthanc.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Delete DICOM modality
endpoints.description: Delete one DICOM modality. This change is permanent iff. `DicomModalitiesInDatabase` is `true`, otherwise it is lost at the next restart of Orthanc.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get modality configuration
endpoints.description: Get detailed information about the configuration of some DICOM modality
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Trigger C-ECHO SCU
endpoints.description: Trigger C-ECHO SCU command against the DICOM modality whose identifier is provided in URL: https://book.orthanc-server.com/users/rest.html#performing-c-echo
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: C-FIND SCU for worklist
endpoints.description: Trigger C-FIND SCU command against the remote worklists of the DICOM modality whose identifier is provided in URL
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Trigger C-MOVE SCU
endpoints.description: Start a C-MOVE SCU command as a job, in order to drive the execution of a sequence of C-STORE commands by some remote DICOM modality whose identifier is provided in the URL: https://book.orthanc-server.com/users/rest.html#performing-c-move
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Trigger C-FIND SCU
endpoints.description: Trigger C-FIND SCU command against the DICOM modality whose identifier is provided in URL: https://book.orthanc-server.com/users/rest.html#performing-query-retrieve-c-find-and-find-with-rest
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Trigger storage commitment request
endpoints.description: Trigger a storage commitment request to some remote DICOM modality whose identifier is provided in the URL: https://book.orthanc-server.com/users/storage-commitment.html#storage-commitment-scu
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Trigger C-STORE SCU
endpoints.description: Start a C-STORE SCU command as a job, in order to send DICOM resources stored locally to some remote DICOM modality whose identifier is provided in the URL: https://book.orthanc-server.com/users/rest.html#rest-store-scu
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: List the available patients
endpoints.description: List the Orthanc identifiers of all the available DICOM patients
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: Get information about some patient
endpoints.description: Get detailed information about the DICOM patient whose Orthanc identifier is provided in the URL
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Delete some patient
endpoints.description: Delete the DICOM patient whose Orthanc identifier is provided in the URL
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Anonymize patient
endpoints.description: Start a job that will anonymize all the DICOM instances within the patient whose identifier is provided in the URL. The modified DICOM instances will be stored into a brand new patient, whose Orthanc identifiers will be returned by the job. https://book.orthanc-server.com/users/anonymization.html#anonymization-of-patients-studies-or-series
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Create ZIP archive
endpoints.description: Synchronously create a ZIP archive containing the DICOM patient whose Orthanc identifier is provided in the URL. This flavor is synchronous, which might *not* be desirable to archive large amount of data, as it might lead to network timeouts. Prefer the asynchronous version using `POST` method.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Create ZIP archive
endpoints.description: Create a ZIP archive containing the DICOM patient whose Orthanc identifier is provided in the URL
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: List attachments
endpoints.description: Get the list of attachments that are associated with the given patient
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: List operations on attachments
endpoints.description: Get the list of the operations that are available for attachments associated with the given patient
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: Delete attachment
endpoints.description: Delete an attachment associated with the given DICOM patient. This call will fail if trying to delete a system attachment (i.e. whose index is < 1024).
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: Compress attachment
endpoints.description: Change the compression scheme that is used to store an attachment.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: Get attachment (no decompression)
endpoints.description: Get the (binary) content of one attachment associated with the given patient. The attachment will not be decompressed if `StorageCompression` is `true`.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: Get MD5 of attachment on disk
endpoints.description: Get the MD5 hash of one attachment associated with the given patient, as stored on the disk. This is different from `.../md5` iff `EnableStorage` is `true`.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: Get size of attachment on disk
endpoints.description: Get the size of one attachment associated with the given patient, as stored on the disk. This is different from `.../size` iff `EnableStorage` is `true`.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: Get attachment
endpoints.description: Get the (binary) content of one attachment associated with the given patient
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: Get info about the attachment
endpoints.description: Get all the information about the attachment associated with the given patient
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: Is attachment compressed?
endpoints.description: Test whether the attachment has been stored as a compressed file on the disk.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: Get MD5 of attachment
endpoints.description: Get the MD5 hash of one attachment associated with the given patient
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: Get size of attachment
endpoints.description: Get the size of one attachment associated with the given patient
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: Uncompress attachment
endpoints.description: Change the compression scheme that is used to store an attachment.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: Verify attachment
endpoints.description: Verify that the attachment is not corrupted, by validating its MD5 hash
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: Get child instances
endpoints.description: Get detailed information about the child instances of the DICOM patient whose Orthanc identifier is provided in the URL
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get tags of instances
endpoints.description: Get the tags of all the child instances of the DICOM patient whose Orthanc identifier is provided in the URL
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Create DICOMDIR media
endpoints.description: Synchronously create a DICOMDIR media containing the DICOM patient whose Orthanc identifier is provided in the URL. This flavor is synchronous, which might *not* be desirable to archive large amount of data, as it might lead to network timeouts. Prefer the asynchronous version using `POST` method.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Create DICOMDIR media
endpoints.description: Create a DICOMDIR media containing the DICOM patient whose Orthanc identifier is provided in the URL
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: List metadata
endpoints.description: Get the list of metadata that are associated with the given patient
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get metadata
endpoints.description: Get the value of a metadata that is associated with the given patient
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: Delete metadata
endpoints.description: Delete some metadata associated with the given DICOM patient. This call will fail if trying to delete a system metadata (i.e. whose index is < 1024).
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: Modify patient
endpoints.description: Start a job that will modify all the DICOM instances within the patient whose identifier is provided in the URL. The modified DICOM instances will be stored into a brand new patient, whose Orthanc identifiers will be returned by the job. https://book.orthanc-server.com/users/anonymization.html#modification-of-studies-or-series
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get patient module
endpoints.description: Get the patient module of the DICOM patient whose Orthanc identifier is provided in the URL
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Is the patient protected against recycling?
endpoints.description: Is the patient protected against recycling?
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Protect one patient against recycling
endpoints.description: Check out configuration options `MaximumStorageSize` and `MaximumPatientCount`
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Reconstruct tags & optionally files of patient
endpoints.description: Reconstruct the main DICOM tags in DB of the patient whose Orthanc identifier is provided in the URL. This is useful if child studies/series/instances have inconsistent values for higher-level tags, in order to force Orthanc to use the value from the resource of interest. Beware that this is a time-consuming operation, as all the children DICOM instances will be parsed again, and the Orthanc index will be updated accordingly.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get child series
endpoints.description: Get detailed information about the child series of the DICOM patient whose Orthanc identifier is provided in the URL
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get shared tags
endpoints.description: Extract the DICOM tags whose value is constant across all the child instances of the DICOM patient whose Orthanc identifier is provided in the URL
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get patient statistics
endpoints.description: Get statistics about the given patient
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get child studies
endpoints.description: Get detailed information about the child studies of the DICOM patient whose Orthanc identifier is provided in the URL
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: List Orthanc peers
endpoints.description: List all the Orthanc peers that are known to Orthanc. This corresponds either to the content of the `OrthancPeers` configuration option, or to the information stored in the database if `OrthancPeersInDatabase` is `true`.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: List operations on peer
endpoints.description: List the operations that are available for an Orthanc peer.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Update Orthanc peer
endpoints.description: Define a new Orthanc peer, or update an existing one. This change is permanent iff. `OrthancPeersInDatabase` is `true`, otherwise it is lost at the next restart of Orthanc.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Delete Orthanc peer
endpoints.description: Delete one Orthanc peer. This change is permanent iff. `OrthancPeersInDatabase` is `true`, otherwise it is lost at the next restart of Orthanc.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get peer configuration
endpoints.description: Get detailed information about the configuration of some Orthanc peer
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Send to Orthanc peer
endpoints.description: Send DICOM resources stored locally to some remote Orthanc peer whose identifier is provided in the URL: https://book.orthanc-server.com/users/rest.html#sending-one-resource
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get peer system information
endpoints.description: Get system information about some Orthanc peer. This corresponds to doing a `GET` request against the `/system` URI of the remote peer. This route can be used to test connectivity.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: List plugins
endpoints.description: List all the installed plugins
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: Get plugin
endpoints.description: Get system information about the plugin whose identifier is provided in the URL
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: List query/retrieve operations
endpoints.description: List the identifiers of all the query/retrieve operations on DICOM modalities, as initiated by calls to `/modalities/{id}/query`. The length of this list is bounded by the `QueryRetrieveSize` configuration option of Orthanc. https://book.orthanc-server.com/users/rest.html#performing-query-retrieve-c-find-and-find-with-rest
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: List operations on a query
endpoints.description: List the available operations for the query/retrieve operation whose identifier is provided in the URL
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Delete a query
endpoints.description: Delete the query/retrieve operation whose identifier is provided in the URL
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: List answers to a query
endpoints.description: List the indices of all the available answers resulting from a query/retrieve operation on some DICOM modality, whose identifier is provided in the URL
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: List operations on an answer
endpoints.description: List the available operations on an answer associated with the query/retrieve operation whose identifier is provided in the URL
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{INDEX}} with a real index.

endpoints.name: Get one answer
endpoints.description: Get the content (DICOM tags) of one answer associated with the query/retrieve operation whose identifier is provided in the URL
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{INDEX}} with a real index.

endpoints.name: Query the child instances of an answer
endpoints.description: Issue a second DICOM C-FIND operation, in order to query the child instances associated with one answer to some query/retrieve operation whose identifiers are provided in the URL
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{INDEX}} with a real index.

endpoints.name: Query the child series of an answer
endpoints.description: Issue a second DICOM C-FIND operation, in order to query the child series associated with one answer to some query/retrieve operation whose identifiers are provided in the URL
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{INDEX}} with a real index.

endpoints.name: Query the child studies of an answer
endpoints.description: Issue a second DICOM C-FIND operation, in order to query the child studies associated with one answer to some query/retrieve operation whose identifiers are provided in the URL
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{INDEX}} with a real index.

endpoints.name: Retrieve one answer
endpoints.description: Start a C-MOVE SCU command as a job, in order to retrieve one answer associated with the query/retrieve operation whose identifiers are provided in the URL: https://book.orthanc-server.com/users/rest.html#performing-retrieve-c-move
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{INDEX}} with a real index.

endpoints.name: Get level of original query
endpoints.description: Get the query level (value of the `QueryRetrieveLevel` tag) of the query/retrieve operation whose identifier is provided in the URL
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get modality of original query
endpoints.description: Get the identifier of the DICOM modality that was targeted by the query/retrieve operation whose identifier is provided in the URL
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get original query arguments
endpoints.description: Get the original DICOM filter associated with the query/retrieve operation whose identifier is provided in the URL
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Retrieve all answers
endpoints.description: Start a C-MOVE SCU command as a job, in order to retrieve all the answers associated with the query/retrieve operation whose identifier is provided in the URL: https://book.orthanc-server.com/users/rest.html#performing-retrieve-c-move
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: List the available series
endpoints.description: List the Orthanc identifiers of all the available DICOM series
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: Get information about some series
endpoints.description: Get detailed information about the DICOM series whose Orthanc identifier is provided in the URL
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Delete some series
endpoints.description: Delete the DICOM series whose Orthanc identifier is provided in the URL
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Anonymize series
endpoints.description: Start a job that will anonymize all the DICOM instances within the series whose identifier is provided in the URL. The modified DICOM instances will be stored into a brand new series, whose Orthanc identifiers will be returned by the job. https://book.orthanc-server.com/users/anonymization.html#anonymization-of-patients-studies-or-series
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Create ZIP archive
endpoints.description: Synchronously create a ZIP archive containing the DICOM series whose Orthanc identifier is provided in the URL. This flavor is synchronous, which might *not* be desirable to archive large amount of data, as it might lead to network timeouts. Prefer the asynchronous version using `POST` method.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Create ZIP archive
endpoints.description: Create a ZIP archive containing the DICOM series whose Orthanc identifier is provided in the URL
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: List attachments
endpoints.description: Get the list of attachments that are associated with the given series
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: List operations on attachments
endpoints.description: Get the list of the operations that are available for attachments associated with the given series
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: Delete attachment
endpoints.description: Delete an attachment associated with the given DICOM series. This call will fail if trying to delete a system attachment (i.e. whose index is < 1024).
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: Compress attachment
endpoints.description: Change the compression scheme that is used to store an attachment.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: Get attachment (no decompression)
endpoints.description: Get the (binary) content of one attachment associated with the given series. The attachment will not be decompressed if `StorageCompression` is `true`.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: Get MD5 of attachment on disk
endpoints.description: Get the MD5 hash of one attachment associated with the given series, as stored on the disk. This is different from `.../md5` iff `EnableStorage` is `true`.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: Get size of attachment on disk
endpoints.description: Get the size of one attachment associated with the given series, as stored on the disk. This is different from `.../size` iff `EnableStorage` is `true`.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: Get attachment
endpoints.description: Get the (binary) content of one attachment associated with the given series
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: Get info about the attachment
endpoints.description: Get all the information about the attachment associated with the given series
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: Is attachment compressed?
endpoints.description: Test whether the attachment has been stored as a compressed file on the disk.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: Get MD5 of attachment
endpoints.description: Get the MD5 hash of one attachment associated with the given series
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: Get size of attachment
endpoints.description: Get the size of one attachment associated with the given series
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: Uncompress attachment
endpoints.description: Change the compression scheme that is used to store an attachment.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: Verify attachment
endpoints.description: Verify that the attachment is not corrupted, by validating its MD5 hash
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: Get child instances
endpoints.description: Get detailed information about the child instances of the DICOM series whose Orthanc identifier is provided in the URL
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get tags of instances
endpoints.description: Get the tags of all the child instances of the DICOM series whose Orthanc identifier is provided in the URL
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Create DICOMDIR media
endpoints.description: Synchronously create a DICOMDIR media containing the DICOM series whose Orthanc identifier is provided in the URL. This flavor is synchronous, which might *not* be desirable to archive large amount of data, as it might lead to network timeouts. Prefer the asynchronous version using `POST` method.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Create DICOMDIR media
endpoints.description: Create a DICOMDIR media containing the DICOM series whose Orthanc identifier is provided in the URL
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: List metadata
endpoints.description: Get the list of metadata that are associated with the given series
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get metadata
endpoints.description: Get the value of a metadata that is associated with the given series
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: Delete metadata
endpoints.description: Delete some metadata associated with the given DICOM series. This call will fail if trying to delete a system metadata (i.e. whose index is < 1024).
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: Modify series
endpoints.description: Start a job that will modify all the DICOM instances within the series whose identifier is provided in the URL. The modified DICOM instances will be stored into a brand new series, whose Orthanc identifiers will be returned by the job. https://book.orthanc-server.com/users/anonymization.html#modification-of-studies-or-series
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get series module
endpoints.description: Get the series module of the DICOM series whose Orthanc identifier is provided in the URL
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Decode series for numpy
endpoints.description: Decode the given DICOM series, for use with numpy in Python. The numpy array has 4 dimensions: (frame, height, width, color channel).
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Order the slices
endpoints.description: Sort the instances and frames (slices) of the DICOM series whose Orthanc identifier is provided in the URL. This URI is essentially used by the Orthanc Web viewer and by the Osimis Web viewer.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get parent patient
endpoints.description: Get detailed information about the parent patient of the DICOM series whose Orthanc identifier is provided in the URL
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Reconstruct tags & optionally files of series
endpoints.description: Reconstruct the main DICOM tags in DB of the series whose Orthanc identifier is provided in the URL. This is useful if child studies/series/instances have inconsistent values for higher-level tags, in order to force Orthanc to use the value from the resource of interest. Beware that this is a time-consuming operation, as all the children DICOM instances will be parsed again, and the Orthanc index will be updated accordingly.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get shared tags
endpoints.description: Extract the DICOM tags whose value is constant across all the child instances of the DICOM series whose Orthanc identifier is provided in the URL
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get series statistics
endpoints.description: Get statistics about the given series
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get parent study
endpoints.description: Get detailed information about the parent study of the DICOM series whose Orthanc identifier is provided in the URL
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get database statistics
endpoints.description: Get statistics related to the database of Orthanc
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: Get storage commitment report
endpoints.description: Get the storage commitment report whose identifier is provided in the URL: https://book.orthanc-server.com/users/storage-commitment.html#storage-commitment-scu
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Remove after storage commitment
endpoints.description: Remove out of Orthanc, the DICOM instances that have been reported to have been properly received the storage commitment report whose identifier is provided in the URL. This is only possible if the `Status` of the storage commitment report is `Success`. https://book.orthanc-server.com/users/storage-commitment.html#removing-the-instances
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: List the available studies
endpoints.description: List the Orthanc identifiers of all the available DICOM studies
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: Get information about some study
endpoints.description: Get detailed information about the DICOM study whose Orthanc identifier is provided in the URL
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Delete some study
endpoints.description: Delete the DICOM study whose Orthanc identifier is provided in the URL
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Anonymize study
endpoints.description: Start a job that will anonymize all the DICOM instances within the study whose identifier is provided in the URL. The modified DICOM instances will be stored into a brand new study, whose Orthanc identifiers will be returned by the job. https://book.orthanc-server.com/users/anonymization.html#anonymization-of-patients-studies-or-series
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Create ZIP archive
endpoints.description: Synchronously create a ZIP archive containing the DICOM study whose Orthanc identifier is provided in the URL. This flavor is synchronous, which might *not* be desirable to archive large amount of data, as it might lead to network timeouts. Prefer the asynchronous version using `POST` method.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Create ZIP archive
endpoints.description: Create a ZIP archive containing the DICOM study whose Orthanc identifier is provided in the URL
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get size of attachment on disk
endpoints.description: Get the size of one attachment associated with the given study, as stored on the disk. This is different from `.../size` iff `EnableStorage` is `true`.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: Get child instances
endpoints.description: Get detailed information about the child instances of the DICOM study whose Orthanc identifier is provided in the URL
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get tags of instances
endpoints.description: Get the tags of all the child instances of the DICOM study whose Orthanc identifier is provided in the URL
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Create DICOMDIR media
endpoints.description: Synchronously create a DICOMDIR media containing the DICOM study whose Orthanc identifier is provided in the URL. This flavor is synchronous, which might *not* be desirable to archive large amount of data, as it might lead to network timeouts. Prefer the asynchronous version using `POST` method.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Create DICOMDIR media
endpoints.description: Create a DICOMDIR media containing the DICOM study whose Orthanc identifier is provided in the URL
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Merge study
endpoints.description: Start a new job so as to move some DICOM resources into the DICOM study whose Orthanc identifier is provided in the URL: https://book.orthanc-server.com/users/anonymization.html#merging
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.description: Get the list of metadata that are associated with the given study
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.description: Get the value of a metadata that is associated with the given study
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: Modify study
endpoints.description: Start a job that will modify all the DICOM instances within the study whose identifier is provided in the URL. The modified DICOM instances will be stored into a brand new study, whose Orthanc identifiers will be returned by the job. https://book.orthanc-server.com/users/anonymization.html#modification-of-studies-or-series
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get study module
endpoints.description: Get the study module of the DICOM study whose Orthanc identifier is provided in the URL
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get patient module of study
endpoints.description: Get the patient module of the DICOM study whose Orthanc identifier is provided in the URL
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get parent patient
endpoints.description: Get detailed information about the parent patient of the DICOM study whose Orthanc identifier is provided in the URL
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Reconstruct tags & optionally files of study
endpoints.description: Reconstruct the main DICOM tags in DB of the study whose Orthanc identifier is provided in the URL. This is useful if child studies/series/instances have inconsistent values for higher-level tags, in order to force Orthanc to use the value from the resource of interest. Beware that this is a time-consuming operation, as all the children DICOM instances will be parsed again, and the Orthanc index will be updated accordingly.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get child series
endpoints.description: Get detailed information about the child series of the DICOM study whose Orthanc identifier is provided in the URL
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get shared tags
endpoints.description: Extract the DICOM tags whose value is constant across all the child instances of the DICOM study whose Orthanc identifier is provided in the URL
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Split study
endpoints.description: Start a new job so as to split the DICOM study whose Orthanc identifier is provided in the URL, by taking some of its children series or instances out of it and putting them into a brand new study (this new study is created by setting the `StudyInstanceUID` tag to a random identifier): https://book.orthanc-server.com/users/anonymization.html#splitting
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get study statistics
endpoints.description: Get statistics about the given study
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get system information
endpoints.description: Get system information about Orthanc
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: List operations
endpoints.description: List the available operations under URI `/tools/`
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: Get accepted transfer syntaxes
endpoints.description: Get the list of UIDs of the DICOM transfer syntaxes that are accepted by Orthanc C-STORE SCP. This corresponds to the configuration options `AcceptedTransferSyntaxes` and `XXXTransferSyntaxAccepted`.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: Anonymize a set of resources
endpoints.description: Start a job that will anonymize all the DICOM patients, studies, series or instances whose identifiers are provided in the `Resources` field.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: Describe a set of resources
endpoints.description: Get the content all the DICOM patients, studies, series or instances whose identifiers are provided in the `Resources` field, in one single call.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: Delete a set of resources
endpoints.description: Delete all the DICOM patients, studies, series or instances whose identifiers are provided in the `Resources` field.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: Modify a set of resources
endpoints.description: Start a job that will modify all the DICOM patients, studies, series or instances whose identifiers are provided in the `Resources` field.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: Create ZIP archive
endpoints.description: Create a ZIP archive containing the DICOM resources (patients, studies, series, or instances) whose Orthanc identifiers are provided in the body
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: Create one DICOM instance
endpoints.description: Create one DICOM instance, and store it into Orthanc
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: Create DICOMDIR media
endpoints.description: Create a DICOMDIR media containing the DICOM resources (patients, studies, series, or instances) whose Orthanc identifiers are provided in the body
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: Create DICOMDIR media
endpoints.description: Create a DICOMDIR media containing the DICOM resources (patients, studies, series, or instances) whose Orthanc identifiers are provided in the body
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: Get default encoding
endpoints.description: Get the default encoding that is used by Orthanc if parsing a DICOM instance without the `SpecificCharacterEncoding` tag, or during C-FIND. This corresponds to the configuration option `DefaultEncoding`.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: Get DICOM conformance
endpoints.description: Get the DICOM conformance statement of Orthanc
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: Trigger C-ECHO SCU
endpoints.description: Trigger C-ECHO SCU command against a DICOM modality described in the POST body, without having to register the modality in some `/modalities/{id}` (new in Orthanc 1.8.1)
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: Look for local resources
endpoints.description: This URI can be used to perform a search on the content of the local Orthanc server, in a way that is similar to querying remote DICOM modalities using C-FIND SCU: https://book.orthanc-server.com/users/rest.html#performing-finds-within-orthanc
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: Generate an identifier
endpoints.description: Generate a random DICOM identifier
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: Invalidate DICOM-as-JSON summaries
endpoints.description: Remove all the attachments of the type "DICOM-as-JSON" that are associated will all the DICOM instances stored in Orthanc. These summaries will be automatically re-created on the next access. This is notably useful after changes to the `Dictionary` configuration option. https://book.orthanc-server.com/faq/orthanc-storage.html#storage-area
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: Get main log level
endpoints.description: Get the main log level of Orthanc
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: Get log level for `dicom`
endpoints.description: Get the log level of the log category `dicom`
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: Get log level for `generic`

endpoints.name: Are metrics collected?
endpoints.description: Returns a Boolean specifying whether Prometheus metrics are collected and exposed at `/tools/metrics-prometheus`
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: Reconstruct all the index
endpoints.description: Reconstruct the index of all the tags of all the DICOM instances that are stored in Orthanc. This is notably useful after the deletion of resources whose children resources have inconsistent values with their sibling resources. Beware that this is a highly time-consuming operation, as all the DICOM instances will be parsed again, and as all the Orthanc index will be regenerated. If you have a large database to process, it is advised to use the Housekeeper plugin to perform this action resource by resource
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: Restart Orthanc
endpoints.description: Restart Orthanc
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: Shutdown Orthanc
endpoints.description: Shutdown Orthanc
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: Is unknown SOP class accepted?
endpoints.description: Shall Orthanc C-STORE SCP accept DICOM instances with an unknown SOP class UID?
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.
